creative_goal: Create the lead heroine from the novel excerpt as a premium key visual
character_brief: A calm, intelligent young woman with hidden resolve
source_text: Lin Yue stepped out of the rainy station in a dark coat, calm but alert, with cold neon reflecting across the wet pavement.
scene: rainy station exit at night with neon reflections
lighting: cool rain-blue atmosphere with controlled magenta neon accents
composition: single character focus, clean silhouette, premium poster-like framing
